description: Re-run a narrow, approved subset of a paper or repository workflow with explicit constraints and reporting.

required_inputs.name: paper_id
required_inputs.description: Stable identifier for the source paper being replicated.

required_inputs.name: repository_url
required_inputs.description: Canonical source repository or archive for the replication target.

required_inputs.name: dataset_uri
required_inputs.description: Resolved dataset location for the replication attempt.

required_inputs.name: evaluation_target
required_inputs.description: Named metric or claim being checked in the replication run.
